data.body: DECISION: Using hyperfine for baseline/regression benchmarking per SC1 'hyperfine or equivalent'. Rationale: (1) Ops measured are 10-200ms; outlier noise (concurrent git/fs) is the dominant risk for SC6's >10% regression gate — hyperfine's built-in outlier warnings and confidence intervals directly de-risk this. (2) Cross-platform µs precision vs bash 'date +%s%N' macOS brokenness. (3) Externalizes stats code maintenance upstream. Tradeoff: one new dev/CI dep (Rust binary; 'brew install hyperfine' locally, 'apt install hyperfine' in CI — ~2s install). Scope adjustment: CI install step added to this epic (new task under story 79f3-c7a6).
